title: The Weekly Challenge - 234
task1_desc: You are given an array of words made up of alphabetic characters only.
task1_body: You are given an array of words made up of alphabetic characters only. Write a script to return all alphabetic characters that show up in all words including duplicates. #### Example 1 Input: @words = ("java", "javascript", "julia") Output: ("j", "a") #### Example 2 Input: @words = ("bella", "label", "roller") Output: ("e", "l", "l") #### Example 3 Input: @words = ("cool", "lock", "cook") Output: ("c", "o")
task2_desc: You are given an array of positive integers.
task2_body:
You are given an array of positive integers. Write a script to find the number of triplets (i, j, k) that satisfies num[i] != num[j], num[j] != num[k] and num[k] != num[i]. #### Example 1 Input: @ints = (4, 4, 2, 4, 3) Ouput: 3 (0, 2, 4) because 4 != 2 != 3 (1, 2, 4) because 4 != 2 != 3 (2, 3, 4) because 2 != 4 != 3 #### Example 2 Input: @ints = (1, 1, 1, 1, 1) Ouput: 0 #### Example 3 Input: @ints = (4, 7, 1, 10, 7, 4, 1, 1) Output: 28 triplets of 1, 4, 7 = 3x2×2 = 12 combinations triplets of 1, 4, 10 = 3×2×1 = 6 combinations triplets of 4, 7, 10 = 2×2×1 = 4 combinations triplets of 1, 7, 10 = 3x2x1 = 6 combinations
Last date to submit the solution **23:59 (UK Time) Sunday 17th September 2023**.
